<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.12 -->

# falconprogrammer-nur

Personal NUR (Nix User Repository) for `JonBoyleCoding/falconprogrammer-nur`: exposes custom Nix packages, NixOS modules, and overlays via both legacy `nix-build` and modern flake interfaces, with `update-pkgs.py` automating `default.nix` regeneration from `pkgs/` subdirectory scans.

## Contents

### Package Manifests

- [default.nix](./default.nix) — Top-level manifest; exports `lib`, `modules`, `overlays`, and all package derivations (`alvr`, `cco`, `g13d`, `opencode`, `opencode-sst`, `vpuppr-gd3`, `xgen` via `pkgs.callPackage`; `gitignore-template`, `spec-kit`, `timew-sync-client` via `p_313.callPackage`, `hyuga` via `p_312.callPackage`; `python-jwt_312/313` via `p_3xx.callPackage`). **Do not hand-edit — regenerate via `update-pkgs.py`.**
- [flake.nix](./flake.nix) — Flake entry point; outputs `legacyPackages`, `packages`, `nixosModules`, `devShells.default` across 7 systems. Imports `nixpkgs` pinned to `nixpkgs-unstable`. `forAllSystems` helper drives per-system generation.
- [ci.nix](./ci.nix) — CI consumption target; exports `buildPkgs`/`cachePkgs` (filtered by `isBuildable`/`isCacheable`) and `buildOutputs`/`cacheOutputs` flat lists via `flattenPkgs` recursion.
- [overlay.nix](./overlay.nix) — Nixpkgs overlay form of NUR packages; injects non-reserved attrs from `./default.nix { pkgs = super; }` into overlay `self`.

### Code Generation

- [update-pkgs.py](./update-pkgs.py) — Scans `pkgs/` subdirs, classifies packages (`buildPythonPackage`/`buildPythonApplication`/other), substitutes `<<TEMPLATE_LET>>` and `<<TEMPLATE_PACKAGES>>` tags in `.default_template.nix`, writes `default.nix`.
- [.default_template.nix](./.default_template.nix) — Template source for `default.nix`; contains `<<TEMPLATE_LET>>` and `<<TEMPLATE_PACKAGES>>` injection tags.

### Metadata & Guidelines

- [AGENTS_GUIDELINES.md](./AGENTS_GUIDELINES.md) — Mandatory contributor/agent workflow rules: `update-pkgs.py` run requirements, new-package steps, Python versioning (`buildPythonPackage` multi-version vs `buildPythonApplication` single-version), hash workflow, CI/CD details, and flake output structure.
- [LICENSE](./LICENSE) — MIT license, copyright 2018 Francesco Gazzetta.
- [README.md](./README.md) — Project landing page with CI badge for `Build and populate cache` workflow.

## Subdirectories

- [pkgs/](./pkgs/) — Per-package `default.nix` derivations; each subdir name maps directly to an attr in `default.nix`. `update-pkgs.py` scans this tree.
- [modules/](./modules/) — NixOS modules (`timew-sync-server`, `g13d`, `taskchampion-sync-server`) aggregated by `modules/default.nix`, consumed by `flake.nix` as `nixosModules`.
- [lib/](./lib/) — Project-local Nix utility library stub; currently empty attrset, parameterized by `pkgs`.
- [overlays/](./overlays/) — Named overlay attrset; currently empty `{}`, consumed by `flake.nix` and `overlay.nix`.
- [.github/](./.github/) — Dependabot weekly action-pin updates + two CI workflows (`build.yml`, `auto-update-packages.yml`).

## Architecture / Data Flow

```
.default_template.nix
       │
  update-pkgs.py  ←─ scans pkgs/*/default.nix
       │
  default.nix  ──────────────────────────────────────────┐
       │                                                  │
  flake.nix                                        overlay.nix
  (legacyPackages, packages,                  (nixpkgs overlay;
   nixosModules, devShells)                    filters reserved attrs)
       │
  ci.nix
  (buildPkgs/cachePkgs/buildOutputs/cacheOutputs)
```

`modules/`, `lib/`, `overlays/` imported by `default.nix` directly; `flake.nix` also imports `./modules` independently for `nixosModules`.

## Stack

| Component | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Nix inputs | `nixpkgs-unstable` |
| Python (codegen) | `update-pkgs.py` (no deps beyond stdlib) |
| Flake systems | `x86_64-linux`, `i686-linux`, `x86_64-darwin`, `aarch64-darwin`, `aarch64-linux`, `armv6l-linux`, `armv7l-linux` |
| Dev shell | `nix-init` |
| Cache | Cachix (via `ci.nix` `cacheOutputs`) |

## Behavioral Contracts

`update-pkgs.py` constants (verbatim):
```python
python_versions = ["311", "312", "313"]
python_app_version = "313"
ignore_list = ["example-package", "polydock", "cursebreaker", "pyinstaller"]
limit_python_versions = {"llama-cpp-python": ["310", "311"], "cursebreaker": ["311"], "python-jwt": ["312", "313"]}
limit_python_app_versions = {"hyuga": "312"}
```

Template injection tags (verbatim): `<<TEMPLATE_LET>>`, `<<TEMPLATE_PACKAGES>>`

`isReserved` filter (verbatim, used in both `ci.nix` and `overlay.nix`):
```
n == "lib" || n == "overlays" || n == "modules"
```

`ci.nix` filter predicates:
- `isBuildable`: no `meta.broken`, license free
- `isCacheable`: `isBuildable` + no `preferLocalBuild`

## Patterns

**Generated file**: `default.nix` is machine-written by `update-pkgs.py` from `.default_template.nix`. Edit `.default_template.nix` or `update-pkgs.py`, not `default.nix` directly.

**Reserved attr exclusion**: `lib`, `overlays`, `modules` blocked from overlay injection and CI package sets by `isReserved` — pattern repeated in both `ci.nix` and `overlay.nix`.

**Multi-version Python builds**: `python-jwt` emits two attrs (`python-jwt_312`, `python-jwt_313`) via `p_ver.callPackage` with `{python-ver = ver;}` arg; controlled by `python_versions` and `limit_python_versions`.

**Adding a new package**: drop derivation in `pkgs/<name>/default.nix`, run `update-pkgs.py` to regenerate `default.nix`. If package should be ignored, add to `ignore_list`.
